series_metadata.series_title: Resolved Unpaid Tolls License Plate Image(s)
series_metadata.series_description: Unpaid toll(s) that are paid and resolved. This record series contains license plate images associated with the toll(s)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: payment or resolution. Purge 3 years of payment or resolution or when toll(s) transaction is purged, whichever is sooner
